name: TheHive — alerts / cases import
description: Imports alerts (and cases) from TheHive (the open-source SOAR / case-management platform) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT, the Defender-XDR-aligned layer that feeds incidents). Each TheHive alert/case becomes an ALERT (idempotent by source ref); impacted hosts are linked to their ASSET. Config (worker environment variables): THEHIVE_URL (e.g. https://thehive.lab), THEHIVE_API_KEY (Bearer). Offline: pass `file` = a TheHive alert-export JSON, or run with no config to import the bundled sample.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of alerts to import

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved TheHive export JSON to parse instead of the live API
